storyInfo: Gnosis and his team are preparing to arrest Carolin, who is suspected of stealing military secrets from Kjerag. Enciodes leads his men to the Vine-Bead Court to apprehend a traitor who has been colluding with Victoria. The tension is palpable, conflict threatening to break out with even the slightest touch.

attributes.content: ...You've finally come.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Enciodes.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Naturally, I would not dare refuse an invitation from the Vine-Bead Court... Great Elder Adso.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: If I remember correctly, it shouldn't take very long to get from the Silverash domain to the Vine-Bead Court.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: To be summoned to the Vine-Bead Court is a matter of great importance. As I stand accused of improper dealings with Victoria, I had to make ample preparations to prove my innocence.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Without further ado, Sir Enciodes, please come inside so that we may discuss this further.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: One moment, please.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: A large convoy of vehicles pulls up to the center of the Vine-Bead Court.
Silverash... What is the meaning of this?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Are you not investigating the ties between Karlan Trade and Victoria?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I had someone compile all the documents related to the last decade of business dealings between Karlan Trade and Victoria. It is quite the voluminous collection, so much so that we had to fill several trucks.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Great Elder Adso, if it interests you, please take your time to read through it.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Good... Very good.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Unload everything, then tell your people to leave.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I'm afraid I can't do that.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: What is the meaning this, Enciodes?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: It is true that as of late, Kjerag has had to weather great turmoil. Undoubtedly, Victoria has been at the heart of many of these incidents.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Indeed, our troops have discovered evidence of contact between the Vine-Bead Court and Victorian spies.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Empty accusations. Without proof, what right do you have to investigate the Vine-Bead Court?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Investigate? I would never dream of such a thing. However, the Vine-Bead Court has accused me of 'colluding with Victoria', and so I am here.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: By my command, nobody is to leave the Vine-Bead Court today until Great Elder Adso and I reach a conclusion.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Yessir!
attributes.name: Tschäggättä

attributes.content: Now then, Great Elder Adso.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: ...We've never talked like this before.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I have hardly even seen you on my past visits to the Vine-Bead Court, let alone spoken with you.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I've heard from many clerics that you spent years in seclusion, studying the scriptures in the Hall of Writings and never concerning yourself with temporal affairs.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: It seems you've also come to handle the affairs of the Vine-Bead Court with ease.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: The only thing I've done over the years is ensure that Kjerag follows the path She ordained.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Moreover, we stand at a critical juncture concerning our survival. Should the Vine-Bead Court stand by and watch you drag Kjerag into the abyss, allowing Kazimierz, Victoria, or any other foreign power to devour us?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: You are not the king of Kjerag, Sir Enciodes.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Thank you for the admonition, Great Elder. If Kjerag were to have a king, it could only be Her.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: If there are diplomatic errors the Vine-Bead Court wishes to correct, then Karlan Trade will do our best to cooperate.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: However, there is one question that puzzles me, for which I seek your guidance.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: How exactly is the Vine-Bead Court negotiating with Victoria?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Is it using all of Kjerag as a bargaining chip?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Elder!
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Cleric

attributes.content: (Whispering) We just took a look around. Silverash's troops have already blocked the way down the mountain.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Cleric

attributes.content: (Whispering) We, we'll go check the back door and—
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Cleric

attributes.content: The secret passage?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I wouldn't bother with that unless you're keen on searching for Tschäggättä.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Ahh!
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Cleric

attributes.content: Don't be alarmed. By Kjeragandr, I have no intention of attacking the Vine-Bead Court.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Tell everyone outside to rest where they are. No one is to move without my order.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: ...Enciodes, you accuse the Vine-Bead Court of betraying Kjerag to Victoria. Where is the evidence for your claim?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Please be patient, Great Elder. It will take some time for the evidence to be delivered here.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: In other words, you came empty-handed yet still chose to resort to violence against us.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: You should know what the price is for doing this, head of the Silverash clan.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Look down at the people beneath the mountain. Your elite troops might be able to block off the Vine-Bead Court, but you cannot fight all of Kjerag.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I am willing to give you time... But if you cannot produce conclusive evidence before sundown, I'm afraid that the reputation of Karlan Trade, and even that of the entire Silverash name, will be in tatters.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: You will become untouchables throughout the land of Kjerag.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Indeed. I am, of course, well-aware of the consequences of my actions.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: What I do not know, however, is what it would mean for Kjerag if the Vine-Bead Court is found to be colluding with an enemy that assassinated leaders from the three clans, and was caught in the act of espionage.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I will be with you to witness that moment, Elder.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: ...I know exactly what you're waiting for.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: But, time is not on your side, Sir Enciodes.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Let us in! We were invited by the Vine-Bead Court to participate in the blessing ceremony, and Silverash's goons have no right to stop us!
attributes.name: Agitated Local

attributes.content: Throughout her illustrious career, The Black Knight was unshakeable, even by the most fearsome opponents.
But now, looking down at the teeming crowds crammed onto the narrow mountain road, she feels utterly helpless for the first time.
Why haven't we seen a single cleric here? What is Silverash trying to pull?!
attributes.name: Agitated Local

attributes.content: Please calm down, everyone. The Vine-Bead Court... has encountered some extenuating circumstances, and Sir Enciodes is assisting with the investigation.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: We came here on an invitation, and you're telling us that there are 'extenuating circumstances' now that we're here? Cut the crap!
attributes.name: Agitated Local

attributes.content: A man squeezes through the crowd, but as soon as he takes a step forward, he is met with Degenbrecher's cold glare and has no choice but to retreat, muttering under his breath.
Sir Enciodes will issue an explanation to the public after things have settled down. Please, I ask that you all return home for now.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: ...Ma'am, be careful—
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I'm fine, Degenbrecher. I can stand on my own...
attributes.name: Elderly Local

attributes.content: We all trust you. We know that you're a daughter of Kjerag and would never bring us harm.
attributes.name: Elderly Local

attributes.content: So, can you tell this old woman exactly what is happening with the Vine-Bead Court? What do you know about this whole thing?
attributes.name: Elderly Local

attributes.content: A vehicle winds its way along the mountain road; outside the window, dense dark clouds are gathering, mingling.
The window rolls down, and a few snowflakes laced with unidentified impurities slide into the car before disappearing without a trace.
The signal's a little better now.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: According to our informant, Victoria and the people from the Vine-Bead Court have left the mining site, and have not made any further moves.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: But given this weather, we can expect more heavy snow... It'll take a lot longer to get back to headquarters than expected.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Compared to THAT, this little hiccup can hardly be considered beyond our expectations.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Are you referring to those Victorians from earlier?
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: They got the intel they wanted, but so did we.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I mean the Vine-Bead Court.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: The Vine-Bead Court, huh...
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: The fact that they'd show up here instead of calming the populace is rather strange indeed...
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: It's evident that they were completely unprepared for the situation, and their deliberate attempts to hide their schemes are easily seen through.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: If some of them are willing to play cover-up for the Victorians—
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Then, it's only a matter of time until the mask comes off.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: It's nearly time.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Turn back to the mining site.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Are you trying to...?
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: The exit ways there are now open, making it a good place to leave the country.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: As you just heard, Enciodes has already surrounded the Vine-Bead Court with his men. He has deliberately made a big show of things to alert the enemy.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Those hiding in Kjerag will definitely be itching to seize the moment.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Our undercover agent friend we've been tracking seems to have a particular fondness for this kind of stuff, and should be arriving in the vicinity soon.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Moreover, I suspect she's not the only one either.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Instead of looking for her, we should just let her come to us.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Gather everyone together and keep a close eye on the entrance to the mining site. Pay extra attention to—
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: The people who helped her escape.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: ...While you were on your way, the clergy throughout the city were already inviting people to come up the mountain for the ceremony.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I wonder, how long Degenbrecher can hold them back?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Did the Vine-Bead Court stoop to these desperate measures knowing I would not point my weapons at the people?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: It's true that I'm using them, just as you did to Arctosz and Ratatos during the Holy Hunt a few years ago.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Perhaps I overestimated you, Sir Enciodes. Even if you're hungry for power, you should be less obvious about it.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Before you commit a grave error, I am willing to announce to the public that you've come to the Vine-Bead Court to capture the Victorian assassin.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: If you truly thought highly of me in any capacity, you would not think that I am only 'seeking power'.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: All I care about is the future of the land of Kjerag.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: So, a violent coup is the best path forward?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Because our Victorian friend sits in a position that cannot be reached except through violence.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Hahahaha! What you say is true, Sir Enciodes.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The unarmed Vine-Bead Court, driven to despair by the descendants of Victorians and their acolytes, helpless to defend themselves even when thieves cry thief in front of them.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Behavior determines identity better than blood.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: It is a fact that since the attack on Ensia, people from the Vine-Bead Court have been falling over themselves to back Victoria.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: If you are so confident you know what I'm waiting for—
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: The cleric and the Victorian spy caught red-handed together. Be it for the general public or the three clans, the rest speaks for itself.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I know no more about the conduct of these clerics than you do.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Even if the Duke of Caster were to come here herself, she would only tell you that I firmly rejected her offer.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: That is nothing more than an excuse. A failure to control your subordinates means you are equally responsible for them, and the same applies to Karlan Trade.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: ...What you suggest is that the clergy of the Vine-Bead Court indulge in pleasure and collude with foreigners, while I remain oblivious and allow them to sell out Kjerag?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: You and Victoria share many of the same delusions; in reality, the Vine-Bead Court has only ever wanted to use this as a pretext to expel Victoria and their true ally—
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Enciodes Silverash.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: However, the reality is that they ended up aligning with Victoria in practice—
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: All the clergy who've associated with Victoria have sworn an oath of death after you are expelled.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Their bones will nourish Kjerag's future, and they will leave no regrets behind.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: So, what you propose is that Kjerag should purge itself, down to those who hunt Victorian spies to this day, those who the Duke of Caster considers enemies...
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: And THAT is the only way to defeat Victoria?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: There is nobody around. A sudden gust of wind suddenly howls through the unfamiliar courtyard.
Carolin continues to stir around her piping-hot cup of savory milk tea, the spoon continuing to clink against the cup.
She shudders in anticipation, either due to the drink or her impending evacuation.
She stares at the swirling tea and strokes the cup, completely ignorant to the fact that the cup is engraved with Kjerag's mountain ridges.
Her thoughts are interrupted by a knock on the door.
Who is it?
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: ...Stay back!
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: Sorry to keep you waiting, young lady of Victoria.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: It's you...
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: Please pardon my intrusion, but due to the situation changing, you will be transferred to a new destination ahead of schedule.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: ...What happened?
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: I only know the gist of the Vine-Bead Court's decision.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: A 'gist' isn't good enough. We need to have a concrete plan of action, or else...
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: I will take full responsibility for the operation until you have safely left Kjerag's borders.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: All you need to do is follow the instructions. As for how to leave and who will help you—
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: Don't overly concern yourself about such things.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: Kjeragandr witnesses all, and She shall walk with us.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: Stop trying to fool me with your vague and nondescript dogma...
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: In other words, I've become your responsibility now, right?
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: I am but a follower of Her will.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: Fine. You have your beliefs, and I have mine.
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: But since we'll be working together, let me remind you that if this operation fails, your side will also be exposed.
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: That's right.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: Does that not worry you at all?
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: The cleric simply smiles gently and takes a garment out from his bag.
No, young lady.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: All I need is faith.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: You can also place your faith in us. As long as we are of one heart, we can overcome our fear.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: Cleric of the Vine-Bead Court.
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: I don't think we need to discuss this any further.
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: Instead, let's focus on something useful, like when we leave.
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: My apologies, young lady. This is a cleric's robe that I sewed myself. Please put it on for now.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: This journey will take you past many people and countless eyes. If you encounter someone who comes up to you seeking prayer or answers, do not try to please them. Stay silent, and avoid them.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: I will walk with you, no matter what dangers we may face.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: Color me curious. Why do people pray to your god for protection even after a Catastrophe?
attributes.name: Carolin

attributes.content: Just in case.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: Believe me, young lady. You know too little about Kjerag.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: Now, please pack your belongings. I will wait for you outside.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: The door opens, and a dry, cold wind rushes in, lashing at the cleric's neck and face.
An old dagger slips from his bag, and he nonchalantly bends down to pick it up.
He knows exactly what this amulet, forged for him by his father who has returned to Kjeragandr, will ultimately be used for.
By Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: May this devout body be blessed, and may it spread Your holy will.
attributes.name: Elderly Cleric

attributes.content: They brought excellent seeds to Kjerag as well as machinery... The Vine-Bead Court has never denied these contributions.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: To be frank, I have never seen anyone so complicated in my already-withering life...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Hero.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: This does nothing to dispel my doubts.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Compared to these acts, the Vine-Bead Court seems only to recognize friend and foe based on where they come from.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Then, allow me to ask you a question first, Sir Enciodes.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: In your heart of hearts, what exactly is Kjerag?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: ...I have already answered this through my actions.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Victorian-style buildings. Victorian-style weapons. Victorian-mandated laws.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Is this your answer?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Unless we choose to seclude ourselves deeper within the mountains, shunning both external disturbances and any further advancement.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Otherwise, you might even be able to see things from Laterano or Leithanien one day.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Until one day, the people of Kjerag believe in nothing but Originium and money, unless faith itself can be sold.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Once the shell of Kjeragandr is ripped open, the people shall no longer hold any reverence for eternity. They will only chase after their own values and desires.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: They will hate the strong because in this new 'theater', the more one abandons his morality, the stronger he becomes.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: They will hate the weak because the weak will come to occupy the crevices of pity and charity.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Nihilism will become the most popular ideology; the people's hearts will become empty and detached, and they will take pride in this emptiness.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Your ideals are slaughtering the people of Kjerag, turning Victoria's present into our future.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: ...The Kjeragandr that the Vine-Bead Court worships is far more fragile than the one I worship.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: If all it takes to overthrow our sacred beliefs are a few foreign tools, then how has Mount Karlan stood to this day?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: How could it be that foreign tools can cover our mountains and rivers, yet foreign ideas can never be touched?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: If this is what you believe, then you must also admit that what can conquer the body can also conquer the soul.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Born into a dark and hopeless era, you must race faster than the clouds to avoid being swallowed by darkness.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Faith should not drive people to become accustomed to the darkness, but rather unwaveringly affirm the yearning for light.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Yet, the more pious one is, the more destitute he becomes. In due time, he will see piety as a noose, and begin to hate the history of faith itself.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Which is why those who adhered to the teachings of Kjeragandr were ridiculed as pedantic and ignorant.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Without turning on the tap, there is no clean drinking water. Without applying chemical fertilizers, there is no fertile farmland.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: You leveled the mountains and forests to build your factories, then sent the displaced back to the ruins of their homes to either sell their labor or die.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The lives you've improved for some, are fed by the happiness you've stolen from others.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: O eloquent grandmaster, I ask you—how should we deal with the 'stragglers' left in your wake?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: ...You are right. It is a heavy responsibility that I must accept.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: However, the Vine-Bead Court only fantasizes about incremental change while continuing to regard doing nothing as a virtue.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Such people have no right to judge me.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I have never sought to block Kjerag's progress. My only responsibility is to pull the reins on self-important tourists before things spiral out of control.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: You're moving too quickly, Sir Enciodes.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The way to format the Kjeragandr, the way to punctuate prayer passages, which hand to raise during rituals... are debates that can last for centuries.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Elder of Clan Browntail, you have both the talent and the platform, and yet you only yearn for the solace of the other shore.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Yet when you hide away in the Hall of Writings and philosophize from your armchair, do you know anything about where Kjerag is actually headed?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: What I know... is that Kjerag would never let an apostate take the helm. And, I have never been one to 'philosophize from my armchair'.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: You are not the first apostate I've dealt with.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: What memories come to mind when you hear the names, Olafur and Elizabeth Silverash?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: What...?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: This bloody weather again... Damn it, why's there a traffic jam in a place like this?
attributes.name: Victorian Agent

attributes.content: Hey, you in the back. The road's about to get real bumpy.
attributes.name: Victorian Agent

attributes.content: If you want to be able to stand after getting out of the truck, I'd recommend taking a nap now and conserving your energy.
attributes.name: Victorian Agent

attributes.content: Inside the rear compartment, the lights flicker as the truck sways. The passengers trying to escape sit upright on their haystacks, eyes tightly shut.
Shit, what's that thing in front of me?!
attributes.name: Victorian Agent

attributes.content: Urgh...
attributes.name: Victorian Agent

attributes.content: An oil slick spills across the middle of the road, and in front of the stopped truck is a line of fully-armed men.
The engine emits a strange, strained noise, and the windows are splattered with paint.
Inside the driver's seat, the Victorian tightly grips the steering wheel.
I've never tried to hide where I come from, even though it's something that others have long forgotten.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: ...Luca Browntail. Ratatos and Sciurus's grandfather. My cousin.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: In order to achieve the same goal, we accepted different fates—to safeguard Kjerag's order through the Tri-Clan Council and the Vine-Bead Court.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Though known for his ruthlessness, he still harbored fantasies about the Silverashes until the very end.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: He said: 'A peaceful resolution is never impossible, as long as the couple are willing to make concessions.'
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: ...But, I have never lived in fantasy.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: That train accident...
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Hahaha... Is that what you believe? Or, did Ratatos make you believe it?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: How many clergymen and devotees do you think are out there among the commoners?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: If the masses wish for Kjeragandr to punish the apostates, then I, serving the Vine-Bead Court, shall deliver on those wishes.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: ...Sir Enciodes!
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The man who killed your parents is right in front of you.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Those who commit murder will be punished twice over by Kjeragandr. This crippled body has lost any meaning for me long ago!
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I grant you permission to dispose of me as you wish for reasons private and public, not for treason, but for murder. Arrest me here and put me on trial!
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Let the people of Kjerag see just how sinful it is to kill an apostate!
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The old man wobbles to his feet, his withered fingers clenching into fists as if using all his strength. Suddenly, he stretches his arms out before Enciodes.
Like a sinner waiting to have his confession heard, his cloudy eyes shine with a glimmer of light, as if seeking to quench decades of old grudges with another's anger.
Enciodes slowly closes his eyes, his fingertips wrapping tightly around his cane.
If you're trying to provoke me into acting out of line, I'm afraid your efforts are in vain.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I won't lay a finger on you here...
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: All I can do is ensure that you receive a fair trial...
attributes.name: Enciodes
